title: 10 pts
content:
10 pts
Partial Credit
Some evidence of descriptive devices like vivid language, sensory details, and imagery are present; Focus on more describing than telling.
0 pts
No Credit
Descriptive devices are mostly 'telling' and provide little sensory details to engage the reader.
20 pts
This criterion is linked to a Learning OutcomeRough Draft: Conclusion
5 pts
Full Credit
Concisely and accurately provided a clear and informative overview of the story's central aspects.
0 pts
No Credit
Conclusion provides a weak overview of the story's central aspects.
5 pts
This criterion is linked to a Learning OutcomeRough Draft: Conclusion
5 pts
Full Credit
The conclusion leads the reader out of the essay with sense of completeness or satisfaction.
0 pts
No Credit
The conclusion does not communicate the 'ending' to the essay. It does not leads the reader with sense of completeness or satisfaction.
5 pts
This criterion is linked to a Learning OutcomeRough Draft: Conclusion
